item.title: Building a Dream Home
item.description: Follow the process of creating a dream home, from planning to construction progress. Which stage of the build interests you most?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home
media:content.media:description: Follow the process of creating a dream home, from planning to construction progress. Which stage of the build interests you most?

item.title: Cordless tools get a new upgrade
item.description: A look at the latest improvements in cordless tools, focusing on performance, battery life, and usability. What feature matters most to you?

media:content.media:title: Cordless tools get a new upgrade
media:content.media:description: A look at the latest improvements in cordless tools, focusing on performance, battery life, and usability. What feature matters most to you?

item.title: A full transformation
item.description: See a complete transformation from start to finish, highlighting design, construction, and final details. Which change stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: A full transformation
media:content.media:description: See a complete transformation from start to finish, highlighting design, construction, and final details. Which change stands out most to you?

item.title: Hard Work Builds a Dream Home
item.description: Follow the effort and craftsmanship behind turning a vision into a finished home. What part of the process inspires you most?

media:content.media:title: Hard Work Builds a Dream Home
media:content.media:description: Follow the effort and craftsmanship behind turning a vision into a finished home. What part of the process inspires you most?

item.title: The Stair Wizard
item.description: Watch the careful planning and craftsmanship behind custom stair construction. What makes a well-built staircase stand out?

media:content.media:description: Watch the careful planning and craftsmanship behind custom stair construction. What makes a well-built staircase stand out?

item.title: Building a Dream Home
item.description: A look at the process of constructing a dream home, from planning to progress on site. Which stage interests you the most?

item.title: Laying the Foundations for a Build
item.description: Follow the early stages of construction as foundations are prepared and set for a new project. What step do you think is most important in a strong build?

item.description: Perkins Builder Brothers share Day 31 of the build, focusing on finishing the soffit and fascia.

item.title: Perkins Builder Brothers: Cabin Day 46
item.description: Day 46 of the cabin build brings new progress, challenges, and key construction steps as the project continues to take shape. What milestones are reached at this stage?

item.title: Testing a new tool
item.description: Innovation meets practicality as a new tool hits the workshop. What features make it a game‑changer for builders?
